summary: Verified PVP Photo Session Extraction Fix - Iteration 94. All 4 tests pass (100%). The fix ensures: 1) Backend returns player1_photos and player2_photos nested in session object, 2) Frontend handleGameStart extracts sessionData = gameData?.session || gameData, 3) Creator (player1) sees their own photos (mint_test_*) for selection, 4) Joiner (player2) sees their own photos (mint_15c*, etc.) for selection, 5) isPlayer1 determination works correctly with player1_id from sessionData.
critical_code_review_comments: ✅ PhotoGameArena.jsx Line 1747: sessionData = gameData?.session || gameData - correctly extracts nested session
✅ PhotoGameArena.jsx Line 1750: amICreator uses sessionData?.player1_id for correct determination
✅ PhotoGameArena.jsx Lines 1759-1765: myPhotos and theirPhotos correctly use sessionData?.player1_photos and sessionData?.player2_photos
✅ PhotoGameArena.jsx Lines 1801-1802: fullSession includes player1_id and player2_id from sessionData
✅ Backend game_routes.py Lines 598-604: Returns { session_id, session: {...with player1_photos, player2_photos...} }
✅ Backend game_routes.py Lines 560-561: Session correctly maps creator_photos to player1_photos and opponent_photos to player2_photos

success_rate.frontend: 100% (UI loads correctly, PVP Battle Arena accessible)

seed_data_creation: None - used existing test users with minted photos
context_for_next_testing_agent: PVP Photo Session Extraction Fix VERIFIED. The fix ensures: 1) Backend returns session object with player1_photos and player2_photos, 2) Frontend extracts sessionData from gameData.session, 3) Creator sees mint_test_* photos, Joiner sees mint_15c* photos. Tap sync endpoint also verified working after the fix.
